function extractTestInfoFromRequest(req, reader) {
    const proxyPortHeader = reader.header(req, 'next-test-proxy-port');
    if (!proxyPortHeader) {
        return undefined;

    const proxyPort = Number(proxyPortHeader);

    return {
        url,
